statement.en: Transition metal decoration of Ti oxide supported Ni-based catalysts for low temperature CO2 methanation

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This appears to be a materials chemistry/catalysis research paper (not cs.AI) in preprint/provisional status. The axiom concerns experimental catalyst design with CO2 methanation performance claims. As an unpublished work dated 2026-04-25 (future date suggesting simulation or placeholder), empirical validation status is unknown. The core chemical claims are theoretically falsifiable but require experimental confirmation.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 遷移金属が触媒の「目」となり、低温でもCO2が甘く分解される

visualGlyph.interpretation: TiO₂の土台に三つの遷移金属が花のように咲き、中心のNiを活性化する
